body: Adding parameters for cloud top height diagnostic. I just hand tuned these to get somewhat reasonable default values for cloud top height -- see below figure. Here I am showing a single column simulation of cli over time, with the cloud top (cltz) calculated in red. The code to actually calculate cloud top height will be in a future ClimaAtmos PR but is quite sensitive to these parameter choices. They can be tweaked in the future to get more accurate values!
title: Add parameters for cloud top height diagnostic
